name: 8-Ball Pool!
description:
The "Boathouse", an old port warehouse turned in a nightclub, was your girlfriend's favorite party place.Every Friday night, the sabre-toothed girl did everything she could to make time to come and dance, drink and forget everything off the dance floor and tonight, she was accompanied by you, her newest better half, who by all accounts was far less enthusiastic than she was about drinking and dancing but still happy to spend time with her, just a regular friday night party, that's were you meet Leo, the snow leopard.

Artist: Stoopix
creator: luckyfox
